channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Unpacking Peter Thiel’s big bet on solar-powered cow collars
item.description: Why did Founders Fund invest $220 million in cattle management startup Halter?

item.title: Embattled startup Delve has ‘parted ways’ with Y Combinator
item.description: The controversy around Delve appears to have cost the compliance startup its relationship with accelerator Y Combinator.

item.title: Ryan Coogler Is Shifting ‘Animorphs’ Into a Disney+ Show
item.description: Not content with bringing 'Percy Jackson' and 'Eragon' to TV, Disney's now turned its sights on 'Animorphs.'

item.title: 3 binge-worthy new HBO Max shows to stream in April 2026
item.description: Smiling Friends is among the must-watch shows coming to HBO Max in April.
